meaning: n.炊具,蒸(煮)机,(非生吃的)为烹食所种水果
examples: The pressure cooker is very useful for people who go out all day.
I'm looking for a cooker today.
What's wrong with your new electric cooker?
Once it broke those levels, we will just call it almost like a pressure cooker.
But I cannot cook rice with the precision and competency of the Zojirushi Rice Cooker.
